title: Web & Performance Patch
notes: [color=#7ad4ff]• Fix Web Audio Stutter: [/color] No more freezing on song change
[color=#7ad4ff]• Fix Dynamic Star Rendering:[/color] Fix background stars
[color=#7ad4ff]• Fix Meteor Despawning:[/color] They don't despawn on screen anymore...
[color=#7ad4ff]• Point Ball Logic:[/color] No more ragebait. Point balls now travel the longest distance possible across the screen.

title: Initial Release
notes: [color=#7ad4ff]• Game Release:[/color] Basic retro vertical shooter. Survive meteors as long as possible.
[color=#7ad4ff]• Leaderboards:[/color] Leaderboard scene with multi-page navigation and live ranks.
[color=#7ad4ff]• Upgrade shop:[/color]  Earn Flyons by playing and upgrade your ship.
